title: TWIST
subtitle: Technical note with overview, layer breakdown, and MFU comparison figures.
summary: A technical note for DHeLlam, the ICCD 2025 Best Paper, summarizing the currently available overview, layer breakdown, and H200 MFU comparison figures.
description: This page collects figures related to DHeLlam, an ICCD 2025 Best Paper on general-purpose automatic micro-batch co-execution for distributed LLM training. The current note focuses on the available TWIST visuals, including the overview figure, layer breakdown, and end-to-end MFU comparison.
author: The TWIST Team

content.title: Scope
content.text: This page is a compact technical note built around the TWIST figures already available in the repository and the corresponding DHeLlam publication.

content.title: What can be confirmed from the available figures
items: The note includes three figures: an overview, a layer breakdown, and an MFU comparison.
The MFU comparison figure is titled "End-to-End MFU Comparison on H200 (Qwen3-14B-like)".
The MFU figure compares Megatron-LM and TWIST under two configurations: TP=4, PP=2 and TP=8, PP=1.
The figure labels show 46% vs 49% for one configuration and 41% vs 47% for the other.

content.title: Dhellam overview
content.alt: Dhellam overview figure used in the TWIST note.
content.caption: Overview figure from the TWIST material stored in the repository.

content.title: Layer breakdown
content.caption: The source SVG includes a single Transformer layer breakdown with TWIST compute and communication labels.

content.title: MFU comparison
content.caption: The source SVG includes the title "End-to-End MFU Comparison on H200 (Qwen3-14B-like)" and compares Megatron-LM with TWIST.

content.title: Current note status
content.text: The current page stays close to the available figures and the public publication metadata. It can be expanded later when more written source material is ready.
